rationale: Fresh source-only task-close validation passes for commit 2b74a0a9f3ded314d086df09ba15a8c67aeffeea / tree 8151cf974d6e12ced7cbb345193881387a786d8a. Working tree was clean immediately before validation and recording. The commit tree matches the requested tree and contains the TASK-100 source implementation, feedback/documentation/planning/implementation builds, the superseding implementation build, and .codewiki/validation/2026-05-17-implementation-pass-task-100.json with profile=implementation verdict=pass. TASK-100 is an executable architecture task, not a container: acceptance maps through source-owned GC code, Pi typed tool registration, skill/tool-catalog guidance, prompt asset guards, and hot-retention/session-handoff tests. Required checks and audits passed; the only audit warning is existing graph-health/hot-state hygiene and does not contradict task acceptance. Implementation validation pass was pre-commit/dirty proof only; this task-close report supplies clean immutable commit/tree proof. No task close or purge was performed. Policy blocks task-close validation until source_implementation_build:not-build-ref are recorded.
